ColumnMapping.description: Describes how to produce one output column.

constant.description: Literal constant broadcast to all rows. Mutually exclusive with 'source' and 'expr'.
constant.title: Constant

dtype.description: Target Polars dtype to cast this column to after mapping.
dtype.title: Dtype

expr.description: DSL expression to compute this column (e.g. col("price") * 1.2). Mutually exclusive with 'source' and 'constant'.
expr.title: Expr

fillna.description: Fill-value applied to nulls after mapping.
fillna.title: Fillna

source.description: Source column name in the input file. Mutually exclusive with 'expr' and 'constant'.
source.title: Source

target.description: Name of the output column produced by this mapping.
target.title: Target

ColumnMapping.title: ColumnMapping

ReaderConfig.description: Low-level options passed to the file reader.

encoding.description: Character encoding of the source file.
encoding.title: Encoding

separator.description: CSV field delimiter. Auto-detected when null.
separator.title: Separator

sheet_name.description: Excel sheet name (string) or 0-based index (int). Ignored for non-Excel files.
sheet_name.title: Sheet Name

skip_rows.description: Number of rows to skip before the header.
skip_rows.title: Skip Rows

ReaderConfig.title: ReaderConfig

description: Top-level configuration for a single source format.

columns.description: Ordered list of column mappings defining the output schema.
columns.title: Columns

drop_unmapped.description: Drop source columns not referenced by any mapping.
drop_unmapped.title: Drop Unmapped

name.description: Unique identifier for this format configuration.
name.title: Name

target_schema.description: Name of the TargetSchema to validate against.
target_schema.title: Target Schema

version.description: Config version. Increment on breaking changes.
version.title: Version

title: FormatConfig
